texto: Part of the journey in life is slipping and falling along the way
autor: in these times true friends are the ones who pick you up and dust you off.
explicacao: Citação de in these times true friends are the ones who pick you up and dust you off. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Part of the journey in life is slipping and falling along the way” articula reflexao, ken-poirot, journey em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como viagem e reflexao.
